0.text: Mild bronchiectatic changes in both lungs, more prominent centrally

1.text: Peribronchial thickening in both lungs, more prominent centrally

2.text: Areas of scarring in the form of pleuroparenchymal bands in the lower lobes of both lungs

3.text: Calcified pulmonary nodule measuring 4 mm in the upper lobe of the right lung
